summary.headline: Professional Multi-Asset Market Terminal Enhanced v2
summary.subheadline: Persistent snapshot, macro context, and OHLC history with execution-status Trading Bible layer
version_history: v2.02: Unified versioning, smarter alerts state, and richer analytics alignment
v2.03: Live macro market context integrated into dashboard data
v2.04: Derivatives summary, spot-price fallback, and reader-facing update log

generator_health.summary: Generator sees 7 market assets, 15 trading-bible assets, 7 signals, 4320 snapshots, and 7511 OHLC rows.

regime.summary: Derivatives regime leans crowded short / downside flush watch.

update_log: v2.04: added derivatives summary to the canonical dashboard payload.
v2.04: attached per-asset derivatives compact fields for BTC, ETH, SOL, and ZEC.
v2.04: added spot-price fallback so liquidation zones can still compute when exchange mark price is blocked.
v2.04: prepared reader-facing update log support for the dashboard UI.

macro_context.purpose: Cross-asset confirmation for risk tone, commodities, and equity-index context
